title: 자기소개 - 직업과 일상 묘사
summary: 자기소개 시 직업, 근무 환경, 일상 루틴 순서로 말하면 자연스럽다
현재 진행형(I'm currently ~ing)을 활용하면 생동감 있게 들린다
숫자와 구체적 세부사항을 넣으면 답변이 풍부해 보인다

keyExpressions.en: I work for a mid-sized company
I usually get to work around 9
I've been working there for about

cards.back: I work for a mid-sized company
cards.example: I work for a mid-sized IT company in Seoul.
I'm currently in charge of the marketing team.

cards.back: I usually get to work around 9
cards.example: I usually get to work around 9 in the morning.

cards.back: I've been working there for about 3 years
cards.example: I've been working there for about 3 years now.
